title: Daily Routines
description: Learn to talk about your daily routines, habits, and schedule using present simple with time expressions.
descriptionTr: Günlük rutinlerini, alışkanlıklarını ve programını geniş zaman ve zaman ifadeleriyle anlatmayı öğren.

vocabulary.example: I wake up at 7 o'clock every morning.
vocabulary.extra: My alarm makes me wake up, but I don't want to!

vocabulary.example: I get up five minutes after my alarm rings.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Alarmım çaldıktan beş dakika sonra kalkarım.
vocabulary.extra: On weekends, I get up late.

vocabulary.example: I brush my teeth twice a day.
vocabulary.extra: Don't forget to brush your teeth before bed!

vocabulary.example: I take a shower every morning before work.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Her sabah işten önce duş alırım.
vocabulary.extra: A hot shower after exercise feels amazing.
vocabulary.extraTr: Egzersizden sonra sıcak duş harika hissettirir.

vocabulary.example: I have breakfast at 8 in the morning.
vocabulary.extra: Turkish breakfast is the best breakfast in the world!
vocabulary.extraTr: Türk kahvaltısı dünyanın en iyi kahvaltısı!

vocabulary.example: I leave home at 8:30 every day.
vocabulary.extra: What time do you leave work?

vocabulary.example: I arrive at work at 9 o'clock.
vocabulary.extra: The bus always arrives late in the morning.

vocabulary.example: I work from 9 to 6 every day.
vocabulary.extra: He works at a tech company in San Francisco.
vocabulary.extraTr: San Francisco'da bir teknoloji şirketinde çalışıyor.

vocabulary.example: We have lunch at noon.
vocabulary.extra: I usually eat lunch with my coworkers.
vocabulary.extraTr: Genelde iş arkadaşlarımla öğle yemeği yerim.

vocabulary.example: I cook dinner at home every evening.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Her akşam evde akşam yemeği pişiririm.
vocabulary.extra: What do you usually have for dinner?

vocabulary.example: I sleep 7 hours every night.
vocabulary.extra: I can't sleep when I drink coffee at night.

vocabulary.example: I exercise three times a week.
vocabulary.extra: Do you exercise in the morning or evening?
vocabulary.extraTr: Sabah mı akşam mı egzersiz yaparsın?

vocabulary.example: I start work at 9 AM.
vocabulary.extra: The movie starts at 7 PM. Don't be late!

vocabulary.example: I finish work at 6 o'clock.
vocabulary.extra: What time does the class finish?

vocabulary.example: I usually wake up early on weekdays.
vocabulary.extra: She usually takes the bus to work.

vocabulary.example: I always drink coffee in the morning.
vocabulary.extra: He always arrives on time.

vocabulary.example: I sometimes go for a walk after dinner.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Bazen akşam yemeğinden sonra yürüyüşe çıkarım.
vocabulary.extra: Sometimes I work from home on Fridays.

vocabulary.example: I never skip breakfast.
vocabulary.extra: She never drinks coffee. She prefers tea.
vocabulary.extraTr: O asla kahve içmez. Çay tercih eder.

vocabulary.example: I wake up early on weekdays.
vocabulary.extra: The early bird catches the worm!

vocabulary.example: Don't be late for work!
vocabulary.extra: I went to bed late last night, so I'm tired today.
vocabulary.extraTr: Dün gece geç yattım, bu yüzden bugün yorgunum.

vocabulary.example: I check my emails every morning.
vocabulary.extra: Good morning! Did you sleep well?

vocabulary.example: I have meetings in the afternoon.
vocabulary.extra: On Saturday afternoon, I go shopping.

vocabulary.example: I watch YouTube videos in the evening.
vocabulary.extra: What do you do in the evening?

vocabulary.example: I go to bed at 11 at night.
vocabulary.extra: Good night! Sleep well.

vocabulary.example: My commute takes 40 minutes by bus.
vocabulary.exampleTr: İşe gidiş geliş otobüsle 40 dakika sürüyor.
vocabulary.extra: I listen to podcasts during my commute.

vocabulary.example: I rest for an hour after lunch.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Öğle yemeğinden sonra bir saat dinlenirim.
vocabulary.extra: You need to rest. You look tired.

vocabulary.example: I relax on the couch and watch TV after work.
vocabulary.exampleTr: İşten sonra kanepede uzanıp TV izlerim.
vocabulary.extra: On Sundays, I just relax at home all day.
vocabulary.extraTr: Pazar günleri bütün gün evde rahatlarım.

vocabulary.example: I prepare my clothes the night before.
vocabulary.extra: She prepares lunch for her kids every morning.
vocabulary.extraTr: Her sabah çocukları için öğle yemeği hazırlar.

vocabulary.example: My morning routine takes about one hour.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Sabah rutinim yaklaşık bir saat sürer.
vocabulary.extra: Having a good routine makes life easier.
vocabulary.extraTr: İyi bir rutine sahip olmak hayatı kolaylaştırır.

vocabulary.example: My work schedule is from Monday to Friday.
vocabulary.extra: What's your schedule for tomorrow?

grammar.title: Present Simple with Time Expressions & Frequency Adverbs
grammar.titleTr: Geniş Zaman: Zaman İfadeleri ve Sıklık Zarfları
grammar.explanation: We use the present simple tense to talk about daily routines, habits, and things that are always true. We add frequency adverbs (always, usually, sometimes, never) to say how often we do things. Time expressions (at 7 o'clock, in the morning, on Monday) tell us when.
grammar.explanationTr: Günlük rutinleri, alışkanlıkları ve her zaman doğru olan şeyleri anlatmak için geniş zaman kullanırız. Bir şeyi ne sıklıkla yaptığımızı anlatmak için sıklık zarfları (always, usually, sometimes, never) kullanırız. Zaman ifadeleri (at 7 o'clock, in the morning, on Monday) ne zaman olduğunu söyler.
table: I wake up at 7 AM.
I don't wake up at 7 AM.
Do you wake up at 7 AM?
Yes, I do. / No, I don't.
She brushes her teeth every day.
She doesn't brush her teeth every day.
Does she brush her teeth every day?
Yes, she does. / No, she doesn't.
He always drinks coffee.
He never drinks coffee.
Does he always drink coffee?
Yes, he does. / No, he doesn't.
We usually have lunch at noon.
We don't usually have lunch at noon.
Do you usually have lunch at noon?
Yes, we do. / No, we don't.
They start work at 9.
They don't start work at 9.
Do they start work at 9?
Yes, they do. / No, they don't.
I sometimes exercise in the evening.
I don't sometimes exercise in the evening.
Do you sometimes exercise?
Yes, I do. / No, I don't.
He finishes at 6 PM.
He doesn't finish at 6 PM.
Does he finish at 6 PM?
Yes, he does. / No, he doesn't.

tips.en: Frequency adverbs go BEFORE the main verb: I always wake up early.
tips.tr: Sıklık zarfları ana fiilden ÖNCE gelir: I always wake up early.

tips.en: But AFTER 'be': She is always late. (NOT: She always is late.)
tips.tr: Ama 'be' fiilinden SONRA: She is always late. (She always is late DEĞİL)

tips.en: Use 'at' for clock times: at 7 o'clock, at noon, at midnight, at night.
tips.tr: 'at' saat için kullanılır: at 7 o'clock, at noon, at midnight, at night.

tips.en: Use 'in' for parts of the day: in the morning, in the afternoon, in the evening.
tips.tr: 'in' günün bölümleri için: in the morning, in the afternoon, in the evening.

tips.en: Use 'on' for days: on Monday, on weekends, on Friday morning.
tips.tr: 'on' günler için: on Monday, on weekends, on Friday morning.

tips.en: He/She/It → add -s or -es: works, finishes, watches, brushes.
tips.tr: He/She/It ile fiile -s veya -es eklenir: works, finishes, watches, brushes.

reading.text:
Hey guys! Welcome to my YouTube channel. Today I'm sharing my daily routine. So, let's go!

I wake up at 6:30 AM. Yeah, I know — that's early! But I like quiet mornings. First, I brush my teeth and take a shower. Then I make breakfast. I usually have eggs, bread, and Turkish tea. I never skip breakfast — it's my favorite meal!

I leave home at 8 o'clock and take the bus to work. My commute is about 40 minutes. I always listen to English podcasts on the bus. I arrive at work at 8:45.

I work at a logistics company. I start at 9 and finish at 6. We have a lunch break at 12:30. I usually eat with my coworkers at a small restaurant near the office.

After work, I go to the gym three times a week. On other days, I just go home and relax. I cook dinner, watch some YouTube, and sometimes study English for 30 minutes.

I go to bed at 11 PM. On weekends, my routine is totally different — I sleep late and do whatever I want! That's my day. Thanks for watching!
reading.textTr:
Selam millet! YouTube kanalıma hoş geldiniz. Bugün günlük rutinimi paylaşıyorum. Hadi başlayalım!

Sabah 6:30'da uyanırım. Evet biliyorum — bu erken! Ama sessiz sabahları seviyorum. Önce dişlerimi fırçalarım ve duş alırım. Sonra kahvaltı yaparım. Genellikle yumurta, ekmek ve Türk çayı içerim. Asla kahvaltı atlamam — en sevdiğim öğün!

Saat 8'de evden çıkarım ve otobüsle işe giderim. Yolculuğum yaklaşık 40 dakika. Otobüste her zaman İngilizce podcast dinlerim. Saat 8:45'te işe varırım.

Bir lojistik şirketinde çalışıyorum. 9'da başlarım, 6'da bitiririm. 12:30'da öğle yemeği molası var. Genellikle ofis yakınındaki küçük bir restoranda iş arkadaşlarımla yerim.

İşten sonra haftada üç kez spor salonuna giderim. Diğer günlerde eve gidip rahatlarım. Akşam yemeği pişiririm, biraz YouTube izlerim ve bazen 30 dakika İngilizce çalışırım.

Gece 11'de yatarım. Hafta sonları rutinim tamamen farklı — geç uyurum ve ne istersem onu yaparım! Günüm bu. İzlediğiniz için teşekkürler!

questions.question: What time does he wake up?
What does he do during his commute?
How often does he go to the gym?
What is different about weekends?
options: He sleeps late and does whatever he wants

fillBlanks.sentence: I ___ up at 7 o'clock every morning.
She ___ her teeth twice a day.
I ___ drink coffee in the morning.
He goes to work ___ the morning.
I have breakfast ___ I go to work.
I ___ skip breakfast. It's very important.
I ___ go to the gym. Maybe 2-3 times a week.

multipleChoice.question: "I ___ to work at 9." Doğru olan hangisi?
"She ___ dinner every evening." Boşluğa ne gelir?
"I go to bed ___ 11 PM." Boşluğa ne gelir?
"He ___ exercises. He doesn't like sports." Boşluğa ne gelir?
"We have class ___ the afternoon." Boşluğa ne gelir?
"___ she wake up early?" Doğru olan hangisi?

sentenceOrder.correct: She always drinks tea in the morning
I usually go to bed at 11
What time do you finish work
She takes a shower every morning

translation.english: I wake up at 7 o'clock every morning.
acceptAlso: I wake up at 7 every morning
I wake up at 7 AM every morning
Every morning I wake up at 7

translation.english: What time do you start work?
acceptAlso: What time do you start working

translation.english: I sometimes go for a walk in the evening.
acceptAlso: Sometimes I go for a walk in the evening
I sometimes walk in the evening

translation.english: What do you have for lunch?
acceptAlso: What do you eat for lunch
I go to bed late on weekends

dialog.title: Telling a Friend About Your Daily Routine
dialog.context: Eyüp, arkadaşı Sarah ile kafede oturuyor. Sarah, Eyüp'ün günlük rutinini merak ediyor çünkü her zaman enerjik görünüyor.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Hey Eyüp! You always look so energetic. What's your secret?
lines.textTr: Hey Eyüp! Her zaman çok enerjik görünüyorsun. Sırrın ne?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Ha ha, thanks! I think it's my routine. I have a pretty strict daily schedule.
lines.textTr: Ha ha, sağ ol! Rutinim sayesinde sanırım. Oldukça düzenli bir günlük programım var.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Really? What time do you wake up?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: I wake up at 6:30. I know, it's early! But I like having time in the morning.
lines.textTr: 6:30'da uyanırım. Biliyorum, erken! Ama sabah vaktim olsun istiyorum.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Wow, that IS early! What do you do first?
lines.textTr: Vay, bu GERÇEKTEN erken! İlk ne yaparsın?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: I brush my teeth, take a shower, and then have breakfast. I never skip breakfast.
lines.textTr: Dişlerimi fırçalarım, duş alırım ve kahvaltı yaparım. Asla kahvaltı atlamam.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Good for you! I sometimes skip breakfast. What do you usually eat?
lines.textTr: Aferin sana! Ben bazen kahvaltı atlarım. Genelde ne yersin?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Eggs, bread, cheese, and Turkish tea. Always Turkish tea!
lines.textTr: Yumurta, ekmek, peynir ve Türk çayı. Her zaman Türk çayı!

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Sounds delicious! And what about after work? Do you exercise?
lines.textTr: Lezzetli görünüyor! Peki işten sonra? Egzersiz yapıyor musun?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Yes, I go to the gym three times a week. On other days, I just relax at home.
lines.textTr: Evet, haftada üç kez spor salonuna giderim. Diğer günlerde evde rahatlarım.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Nice! What time do you usually go to bed?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Around 11 PM. But first I study English for 30 minutes. It's part of my routine now.
lines.textTr: Gece 11 civarı. Ama önce 30 dakika İngilizce çalışırım. Artık rutinim oldu.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: That's amazing! Your English is getting really good, by the way.
lines.textTr: Harika! Bu arada İngilizce'n gerçekten gelişiyor.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Thank you, Sarah! Practice every day — that's my motto!
lines.textTr: Teşekkürler, Sarah! Her gün pratik — bu benim sloganım!

questions.question: What time does Eyüp wake up?
How often does Eyüp go to the gym?
questions.questionTr: Eyüp ne sıklıkla spor salonuna gidiyor?

questions.question: What does Eyüp do before bed?
